createOrg.intro: Okusheshayo kakhulu ukuqala nge-akhawunti ye-Twitter yenhlangano yakho (uma unazo eziningi, khetha eyodwa).

gdpr.double_opt_in_help: Abaxhasi abaqinisekisile ukubamba kwabo iqhaza ngokusebenzisa i-URL yokuqinisekisa nge-imeyili
gdpr.opt_in_help: Abaxhasi abakhethe ukubhalisa ku-widget ('Yebo, ngifuna ukuthola ama-imeyili' inkinobho yeradio)
gdpr.opt_out_help: Abaxhasi abangafuni ukuthola incwajana yezindaba (inkinobho yeradio ethi 'Cha, angifuni ukuthola ama-imeyili' kwi-widget noma i-URL yokuphuma ku-imeyili).
gdpr.opt_out_warning: Ngiyazi ukuthi akuvunyelwe ukuxhumana nabasebenzisi abangakavumi ngokusobala ngaphandle kwezimo ezimbalwa kakhulu.

exportType.activities_help: Izenzo zokuthekelisa ezenziwe ngabasebenzisi, njengokusayina, ukwabelana, njll.

export.csv_help: CSV iyifomethi ejwayelekile. Sebenzisa le ngaphandle kokuthi ngempela udinga i-JSON.
export.errorPermission: Awunalo imvume yokuthekelisa idatha yale nhlangano.
export.key_help: Uma idatha yakho ifihlwe, layisha ukhiye wokufihla ngaphambi kokuthekelisa.
export.title: Thumela ngaphandle idatha yamalungu

invite.default:
Umenyiwe ukuba ujoyine i-akhawunti ye- {{org}} ku-dashboard ye-Fix the Status Quo.

Lesi simemo sizosebenza amahora angu-24 azayo. Sicela usamukele ngokushesha okukhulu.

Siyajabula ukuba nawe!
invite.subject: Isimemo sokujoyina i- {{org}} ku-dashboard ethi "Fix the Status Quo"
invite.emailHelper: Sizothumela i-imeyili yesimemo enesixhumanisi ukuze ujoyine ngokushesha.

campaigner.description: Ungabuka futhi uphathe izenzo, abaxhasi, kanye nedatha yomkhankaso. Awukwazi ukushintsha izilungiselelo zenhlangano noma ukuthekelisa idatha.
campaigner.label: Umkhankaseli

coordinator.description: Ungabuka idatha yabaxhasi kodwa awukwazi ukudala imikhankaso, ukuphatha izilungiselelo, noma ukuthekelisa idatha.
coordinator.label: Uxhumanisi

owner.description: Ukufinyelela okuphelele kokuphatha. Ungaphatha konke, kuhlanganise nezilungiselelo, imikhankaso, ukuthekelisa, nokufihla imininingwane.
owner.label: Umnikazi

invite.title: Mema ukuba ujoyine {{org}}
invite.tooltip: Qaphela: Kuphela 'umnikazi' ongakwazi ukuthekelisa idatha yabaxhasi.
invite.translator:
Sawubona,

Siyakumema ukuthi usebenzisane nathi ekuguquleni nasekuthuthukiseni incwadi yomkhankaso yezwe lakho. Ukuqonda kwakho isimo sezepolitiki sendawo kuzoba wusizo olukhulu — hhayi kuphela ekuguquleni, kodwa nasekuqinisekiseni ukuthi umlayezo uyavumelana kahle nabaxhasi.

Incwadi ihlelwe izigaba eziningi, ngayinye inezinguqulo eziningana. Abaxhasi bazothola izinguqulo ezihlanganiswe ngokungahleliwe ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukuzibandakanya futhi kugwenywe ukuthi abamukeli baziphose.

Uma usuvumile isimemo, uzokwazi ukufinyelela incwadi [lapha]({{location}}). **Ungakhohlwa ukulondoloza ngemva kokwenza izinguquko zakho!**

Uma umnikelo wakho usuqediwe, sicela usazise kanye nomxhumanisi ukuze sikwazi ukusabalalisa izibuyekezo.

Siyawazisa isikhathi sakho nobuchwepheshe bakho — lo ngumzamo esabelana ngawo wokuqinisa umthelela womkhankaso.

**Ngenxa yokuphepha, isixhumanisi sakho sokungena isimemo sizophela emahoreni angu-24.**

warning.is_coordinator: Awukwazi ukujoyina umkhankaso ngaphansi kwe-akhawunti ka-{{org}}, ungumxhumanisi we-{{campaign}}
warning.is_member: Ungumuntu oyingxenye yenhlangano ethi **{{org}}** eqhuba lo mkhankaso!

organisation.collectsEmail: Awunayo incwajana yezindaba futhi awufuni ukuqoqa amakheli e-imeyili? (Uzokwazi ukufihla lesi sici ngokwakho kuwebhusayithi yakho) Maka lebhokisi:
organisation.collectsEmailHelper: Anginayo incwajana yezindaba. Ngiyazi ukuthi angifuni ibhokisi lokumaka lokuthola incwajana yezindaba eliqoqa amakheli e-imeyili esingawasebenzisa kamuva.
organisation.doubleOptIn: Abaxhasi bami kumele bafake isicelo kabili ukuze bathole incwajana yezindaba.
organisation.organisationHelper: Uvela kuwo liphi ingxenye lomndeni? Samukela zonke izinhlangano!
organisation.remarks: Ngabe kukhona amazwana mayelana nethuluzi ofuna ukusitshela wona?

onboarding.welcome: Siyakwamukela endaweni yabalingani yalomkhankaso ohlelwe yi- {{coordinator}}
onboarding.verify: I-imeyili yakho ayikakasekelwa. Sicela uhlole i-imeyili yakho bese uchofoza kusixhumanisi sokuqinisekisa ukuze uqhubeke.
onboarding.intro:
Imikhankaso inamandla kakhulu lapho izinhlangano eziningi zisebenza ndawonye ngenhloso efanayo. I-Proca ikunika ithuba lokuba umlingani womkhankaso nokwandisa umthelela wakho, ngenkathi ugcina ukulawula okuphelele ngomlayezo wakho, uphawu lwakho, kanye nokuxhumana nabaxhasi bakho.

[Uma ujoyina umkhankaso](https://fixthestatusquo.com/help/for-partners/), uthola ithuba lokusetha i-'widget' yakho ye-Proca elula ukuyisebenzisa. I-widget ifaka ifomu lokuqoqa izenzo zabaxhasi (isiginesha sephetishini, imilayezo ethunyelwe kulabo abaqondiwe, njll.) kanye nesenzo sokwabelana esihlakaniphile, esivumela abasayinile ukuthi babelane ngesenzo futhi baqoqe ukwesekwa okwengeziwe.

 Zonke izenzo zabaxhasi ezivela kuwo wonke ama-widget abalingani zibalwa ndawonye, zifaka ekubaleni komkhankaso okwabelwana ngakho. Lokho kudala umfutho obonakalayo obuhlangene, futhi kubonisa amandla angempela abantu abanalo lapho sisebenza ndawonye. Ngasikhathi sinye, uhlangothi ngalunye lobambiswano lugcina ulwazi lwawo lokuxhumana nabaxhasi, futhi akudingeki ukwabelana ngedatha okuyinkimbinkimbi.

I-widget isekela izilimi eziningi futhi kulula ukuyihlela ngemibala yakho nelogo yakho. Ukuyifaka kuwebhusayithi yakho kuthatha umzuzu owodwa kuphela, futhi kulula njengokufaka ividiyo ye-YouTube. Akudingeki ulwazi lobuchwepheshe (futhi uma udinga usizo, ithimba le-Proca lizokusekela) [mailto:support@fixthestatusquo.org]!

I-Proca ithatha ngokungathi sína ukuphepha kwedatha yabaxhasi. Iseva yethu ezinikele eJalimane iyahambisana ngokuphelele ne-GDPR, futhi inhlangano yakho ihlala ingumnikazi oyedwa wedatha eqoqwe nge-widget yakho. Ungabheka ukusebenza komkhankaso wakho futhi ulande idatha noma kunini, usebenzisa ideshibhodi yethu elula ukuyisebenzisa. Singahlanganisa ngqo nohlelo lwakho lokuthumela imeyili.

Abalingani abangaphezu kuka-500 sebebasebenzisa iProca emikhankasweni yabo eku-inthanethi, bakhulisa isisekelo sabaxhasi babo, futhi bedala inyakazo eqinile, ebambisanayo. Sihlangene, singadala ingcindezi ewinisa imikhankaso. Hlanganyela nathi!
onboarding.done: Uzothola umlayezo wokuqinisekisa nge-imeyili.  Ungase ufake inguqulo yokuhlola ye-<1>widget kuwebhusayithi yakho</1>.
onboarding.embargoHelper: Ngiyavuma ukuthi izinto zomkhankaso zivaliwe ngokuqinile kuze kube isaziso esengeziwe. Ngiyavuma ukuthi ngeke ngabelane ngalezi zinto nanoma ubani ongaphandle kwenhlangano yami.
onboarding.login: Bhalisa njengomsebenzisi noma ungene ngemvume usebenzisa imininingwane yakho yezokuxhumana noma i-imeyili yakho. Leli akhawunti yakho siqu; uzokwazi ukusetha inhlangano yakho ngemva kokubhalisa.
onboarding.maillingHelper: Ngokuthumela leli fomu, ngiyavuma ukufakwa ohlwini lokuthumela lwe- {{campaign}}. Ngingakhansela noma yinini.
onboarding.title: Joyina lo mkhankaso wobambiswano: wufake kalula kuwebhusayithi yakho nasemithonjeni yezokuxhumana.

You can register an new organisation to: Ungabhalisa inhlangano entsha ukuze ihlanganyele ekuhlanganeni.
Used to pre-fill name, description and l: Kusetshenziselwa ukugcwalisa kusengaphambili igama, incazelo nelogo yenhlangano yakho

join.goal: Lindeleke ukuthi bangaki abantu abazothatha isinyathelo ngewebhusayithi yakho?
join.goalHelper: Lesi sibikezelo sizobonwa kuphela ngumxhumanisi… futhi siyazi ukuthi kunzima ukulinganisa
join.request: Ingabe uhlela ukuthumela imilayezo ekhethekile kubaxhasi bakho? Ingabe futhi uhlela imisebenzi yezokuxhumana, kuhlanganise nokukhangisa okukhokhelwayo?

downloadCSWHelp: Landa idatha yabalingani njenge-CSV. Imininingwane yokuxhumana itholakala kuphela kubalingani abangene nge-URL.
mainLanguageHelper: Uzokwazi ukukhetha izilimi ezahlukene kwama-widget akho.
orgDuplicateError: Inhlangano yakho isivele isebenzisa i-Proca kwelinye umkhankaso. Uma wazi ilungu leqembu eliyidalile, cela ukuthi likumeme, kungenjalo
websiteHelper: Faka iwebhusayithi yenhlangano yakho ukuze uqale
